positive: A high-contrast, symmetrical vintage illustration suitable for apparel print, depicting a stylized celestial forest scene. The main subject is a grouping of delicate, mystical animals (e.g., deer, fox, owls) gathered beneath a crescent moon. The style must be highly graphic, utilizing thick, clean linework, strong silhouettes, and limited, earthy color palettes (deep blues, golds, sage green, black). Incorporate detailed floral patterns and geometric framing elements (mandala/border elements) to enhance the central composition. The overall aesthetic should mimic a beautifully printed woodcut or etched linoleum block print, emphasizing depth through negative space and solid, powerful shapes. The composition must be perfectly centered and scalable.
negative: blurry, low resolution, artifact, watermark, text, messy, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noise, photographic, realistic photo, bokeh, gradient skin, clutter, modern style, logos
